name: signguard-extension-mvp
description: This extension intercepts key `window.ethereum.request()` calls **in the MAIN world** (MV3 `content_scripts[].world = "MAIN"`) and shows a risk overlay **before** the wallet popup.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/build-extension.mjs
scripts.validate:release: node scripts/validate-manifest-permissions.mjs && node scripts/validate-no-node-modules.mjs && node scripts/validate-feature-completeness.mjs && node scripts/validate-release-zip.mjs
